seoTitle: Miles End vs Milford — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Miles End and Milford. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Miles End vs Milford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Miles End and Milford.
heading: Miles End vs Milford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Miles End, Queensland and Milford, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Miles End has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Milford (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Miles End or Milford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Miles End has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Milford scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Miles End scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Milford scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Miles End or Milford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Miles End has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
